title: not_alone.jar
description: This is a horror mod that adds entities to your world
body:
This mod has 3 entities and I wil tell you how to spawn them

![Glitched Eye](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0c5ab334098247ced0bd0ab6f8ae0efb4e1a91ce.png)
This entity you can spawn by attempting to sleep

![Bloody Steve](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e9f64b651bbb037d1a9838d8401f9e5f8228e641.png)
This entity you can spawn by placing a blood block
![Bloody Block recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b84b0b2479ca05335fcac529d5687a16f390b7c4.png)
This is the recipe make it place it down and it will spawn Bloody Steve
![Steve deweller](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bcabae9d5067dd621cdbc477ba169335a65b1738.png)
The steve deweller spawns naturully 



WARNING:
This mod has not been tested with multiplayer but it probbaly will work if you want it to work better it is optional to be on the server side but it has not been tested do at your own risk
